agencyBids.checkPackages: Sprawdź swoje pakiety, aby uzyskać szczegóły.
agencyBids.confirmAcceptDesc: Akceptacja zablokuje umowę na zaproponowane warunki. Tej akcji nie można cofnąć.
agencyBids.confirmWithdrawDesc: Tej akcji nie można cofnąć. Agencja nie będzie już uwzględniana w tym żądaniu opieki.

toast.channelDeadDesc: Aktualizacje w czasie rzeczywistym wstrzymane. Próbuję ponownie nawiązać połączenie...
toast.channelRecoveredDesc: Aktualizacje w czasie rzeczywistym ponownie przepływają.
toast.channelStaleDesc: Ostatnio nie odebrano żadnych danych. Sprawdzam stan kanału.
toast.multiChannelDeadDesc: Wiele kanałów czasu rzeczywistego nie działa. Próbuję ponownie nawiązać połączenie...
toast.multiChannelRecoveredDesc: Wszystkie dotknięte źródła danych ponownie przepływają.
toast.multiChannelStaleDesc: Wiele źródeł danych stało się cicho. Sprawdzam stan zdrowia.

marketplacePackages.caregiverHubSubtitle: Browse published packages and apply to work with an agency
marketplacePackages.publishedPackagesHint: Packages are offered by agencies. Negotiation happens with the agency only.

packageEngagement.clientIntro: Tell the agency you are interested in this package. They can reply with terms or a counter-offer.
packageEngagement.caregiverIntro: Apply so the agency knows you are available for this package.

agencyCaregivingJobs.title: Caregiving jobs
agencyCaregivingJobs.subtitle: Link accepted guardian–agency (GAC) and caregiver–agency (CAC) contracts into operational jobs.
agencyCaregivingJobs.demoOnly: Caregiving jobs are available when the app is connected to Supabase.
agencyCaregivingJobs.noAgency: Sign in as an agency user to manage caregiving jobs.
agencyCaregivingJobs.createHint: Pick a GAC that matches your CAC (package path: package_gac with package_caregiver). Use a distinct assignment label if the same caregiver contract appears twice on one job.
agencyCaregivingJobs.addCaregiverHint: Same compatibility rules as create. Duplicate CAC is allowed with a different assignment label.
agencyCaregivingJobs.emptyJobs: No jobs yet. Create one above once you have accepted package engagements.
agencyCaregivingJobs.noAssignments: No caregiver assignments on this job.

agencyPackageLeads.title: Package leads
agencyPackageLeads.subtitle: Client interest and caregiver applications on your published packages

agencyPackageCatalog.title: Care package catalog
agencyPackageCatalog.subtitle: Published and draft packages your agency offers on the platform.

agencyRequirementBoard.title: Posted care requirements
agencyRequirementBoard.subtitle: Open requests from guardians and patients. Place bids as an agency — this is separate from your care package catalog.
agencyRequirementBoard.coverMessagePlaceholder: Why your agency is the best fit…
agencyRequirementBoard.deviationRemarksLabel: Deviation remarks (if you cannot fully meet the request)
agencyRequirementBoard.deviationPlaceholder: Optional: explain gaps and how you will compensate…

agencyPlacementDetail.cjLinkSubtitle: Associate this placement with a job assignment so shifts stay aligned with GAC/CAC operations.

dailySchedule.addTaskDescription: Create a task or calendar event for the selected day.
dailySchedule.completionNotePlaceholder: What did you do? Any readings or observations?
dailySchedule.empty: No tasks for this day. Add one to get started.
dailySchedule.subtitle: Your to-do list and timed events for the selected day.
dailySchedule.title: Daily schedule

shiftCheckIn.alreadyCheckedInBody: You are already on this shift. End it with check-out when you are finished.
shiftCheckIn.noShifts: No shifts found. Open Shift planner to see assigned shifts.

emergencySos.holdHint: Release to cancel before the ring completes.
emergencySos.holdLabel: Hold three seconds to send SOS
emergencySos.instructions: Press and hold the button for three seconds to log an SOS and alert your care circle.
emergencySos.sendFailed: Could not send SOS. Try again or call emergency services.
emergencySos.sentBody: Your SOS has been logged. If this is a medical emergency, call local emergency services now.
emergencySos.title: Emergency SOS

reassignmentHistory.subtitle: Recent shift reassignments for your agency.

shiftCheckout.doneBody: Your shift is marked complete. Thank you for your care today.
shiftCheckout.notFound: We could not find that shift.
shiftCheckout.readyBody: You will take a selfie and confirm GPS before ending your shift.
shiftCheckout.selfieBody: Confirms your identity at the end of shift.
shiftCheckout.subtitle: End your shift for {{name}} with a quick verification.
shiftCheckout.title: Shift check-out
shiftCheckout.wrongState: Shift for {{patient}} is not ready for check-out (status: {{status}}).

experience.disclaimerLead: You’re in a browser-only preview. Nothing here is saved to the real CareNet production database.
experience.disclaimerRetention: Demo data stays on this device and expires over time (form drafts about {{days}} days). Other cached bits may clear sooner. Clearing browser/site data removes it right away.
experience.replacesSession: Choosing a role below signs you into a demo account and replaces any current session on this device.
experience.selectPrompt: Pick a role to explore the app:
experience.subtitle: Try dashboards and flows with sample data — no real account required.
experience.title: Experience the App

agency.description: Licencjonowane, wysoko wydajne agencje z udowodnioną niezawodnością i standardami zgodności.
agency.title: Sieć weryfikowanych agencji

platform.description: Odkrywaj, rezerwuj, zarządzaj, komunikuj, płać i śledź — wszystko z jednej zaawansowanej pulpitu.
platform.title: Pojedyncza zintegrowana platforma

tracking.description: Pełna widoczność harmonogramów opiekunów i dostarczania usług — wprowadzanie przejrzystości i odpowiedzialności.
tracking.title: Śledzenie opieki w czasie rzeczywistym

verified.description: Opiekunowie z weryfikacją w tle, certyfikowani i godni zaufania — sprawdzani przez weryfikację policyjną, badania medyczne i ocenę psychologiczną.
verified.title: Weryfikowani opiekunowie

hero.subtitle: Najbardziej zaufana platforma Bangladeszu łącząca rodziny z weryfikowanymi opiekunami i profesjonalnymi agencjami

section15.agencyScorecardSubtitle: Agency lens on placement quality (?patientId= for a specific client).
section15.alertsSubtitle: Threshold rules for vitals and safety signals.
section15.careDiarySubtitle: Structured daily notes for your care circle.
section15.carePlanSubtitle: Goals and instructions from your guardian and care team.
section15.caregiverAlertsSubtitle: Active rules for the current patient context (?patientId=).
section15.familyBoardSubtitle: Short updates visible to authorized family members.
section15.guardianAlertsSubtitle: Rules evaluated against incoming vitals and logs.
section15.guardianCareDiarySubtitle: Use ?patientId= to switch patients when you manage more than one.
section15.liveMonitorSubtitle: Snapshot of movement and quality signals.
section15.liveTrackingSubtitle: Latest caregiver check-in coordinates (map integration next).
section15.photoSubtitle: Wound and condition photos with captions.
section15.scorecardSubtitle: Aggregated quality metrics for the selected patient.
section15.smartCareSubtitle: Engineering spikes and data hooks — not production features yet.
section15.symptomsSubtitle: Pain and symptom log over time.
section15.diaryPlaceholder: What happened today? Vitals, meals, mood…
section15.familyPostPlaceholder: Share a short update with authorized family…
